mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO inspection_route
production_line_id, route_code, route_name, creator_id, created_at, updated_at,
#{productionLineId}, #{routeCode}, #{routeName}, #{creatorId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt},
mapper.select:
SELECT ir.id, ir.production_line_id, ir.route_code, ir.route_name, ir.creator_id, ir.created_at AS createdAt, ir.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM inspection_route ir WHERE ir.id = #{id}
AND ir.creator_id = #{creatorId}
